internalDeclarations.type:
{ι : Type u} →
  {α : ι → Type v} →
    Core.DependentEnumeration ι α →
      (p : (i : ι) → α i → Prop) →
        ((index : ι) → (value : α index) → Decidable (p index value)) → Core.FiniteSearch.DependentResult p

internalDeclarations.docString:
Exhaustive nested search over a finite index enumeration and an exact
finite enumeration for each dependent fibre.

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT17.Spec P) (capability : CT17.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT17.Input S capability ctx),
  match CT17.analyzeCompatibility S capability ctx input with
  | CT17.CompatibilityDecision.incompatible residual => ¬S.Compatible ctx residual.target residual.offset
  | CT17.CompatibilityDecision.compatible _state =>
    ∀ (target : S.Target) (offset : S.Offset), S.Compatible ctx target offset
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.analyzeCompatibility_sound

internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Capability.finiteScaleLimit

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT17.Spec P} →
    {_capability : CT17.Capability S} → {_ctx : Core.BranchContext P} → CT17.Input S _capability _ctx → ℕ
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Input.scale

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT17.Spec P) (capability : CT17.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT17.Input S capability ctx) (compatible : CT17.CompatibleState S capability ctx input),
  match CT17.analyzeScale S capability ctx input compatible with
  | CT17.ScaleDecision.finite _state => input.scale ≤ capability.finiteScaleLimit
  | CT17.ScaleDecision.orbit _state => capability.finiteScaleLimit < input.scale
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.analyzeScale_sound

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT17.Spec P) →
    (capability : CT17.Capability S) →

∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT17.Spec P) (capability : CT17.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT17.Input S capability ctx) {compatible : CT17.CompatibleState S capability ctx input}
  (finite : CT17.FiniteScaleState S capability ctx input compatible),
  match CT17.analyzeSurvivors S capability ctx input finite with
  | CT17.SurvivorDecision.exhausted _certificate =>
    ∀ (position : S.Position input.scale), ¬CT17.Survives S capability ctx input position
  | CT17.SurvivorDecision.survivors residual =>
    residual.enumeration.survivors = residual.first :: residual.remaining ∧
      ∀ (position : S.Position input.scale),
        position ∈ residual.enumeration.survivors ↔ CT17.Survives S capability ctx input position
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.analyzeSurvivors_sound

  (orbit : CT17.OrbitScaleState S capability ctx input compatible),
  match CT17.analyzeArithmetic S capability ctx input orbit with
  | CT17.ArithmeticDecision.targetHit certificate =>
    S.orbitValue ctx input.scale certificate.offset = S.targetValue certificate.target

{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT17.Spec P) →
    (capability : CT17.Capability S) →
      (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) → (input : CT17.Input S capability ctx) → CT17.ExecutionResult S capability ctx input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.runReference

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT17.Spec P) (capability : CT17.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT17.Input S capability ctx),
  CT17.RawOutcome.Valid S capability ctx input (CT17.run S capability ctx input).outcome
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.run_verified

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT17.Spec P) (capability : CT17.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT17.Input S capability ctx),
  CT17.Graph.ValidTrace (CT17.ExecutionResult.trace S capability ctx input (CT17.run S capability ctx input))
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.run_trace_valid

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT17.Spec P) (capability : CT17.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT17.Input S capability ctx),
  ∃ result,
    CT17.RawOutcome.Valid S capability ctx input result.outcome ∧
      CT17.Graph.ValidTrace (CT17.ExecutionResult.trace S capability ctx input result)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.run_total

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT17.Spec P) (capability : CT17.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT17.Input S capability ctx) (left right : CT17.ExecutionResult S capability ctx input),
  left = CT17.run S capability ctx input → right = CT17.run S capability ctx input → left = right
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.run_deterministic

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT17.Spec P) (capability : CT17.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT17.Input S capability ctx) (result : CT17.ExecutionResult S capability ctx input),
  result.terminal = CT17.Graph.Terminal.incompatibility ∨
    result.terminal = CT17.Graph.Terminal.exhausted ∨
      result.terminal = CT17.Graph.Terminal.survivors ∨
        result.terminal = CT17.Graph.Terminal.targetHit ∨ result.terminal = CT17.Graph.Terminal.orbit
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.outcome_exhaustive
